XLearn more here with DEXTools Academy articles!

JOIN THE REVOLUTION OF DEFI

DEFI is the future of the finance world. Join our community, learn and take advantage of the most advanced set of trading tools designed for traders, by traders.

Connect Wallet
LAUNCH Wallet

WHAT?

DEXTools is the world's leading DeFi app for trading, with more than 15M monthly users, built with the latest technology and with a huge community giving us feedback everyday.

HOW?

Whether on mobile (Android & IOS), desktop or tablet, just connect your wallet and go! DEXTools is free for all users, but you can hold $DEXT token to gain access to premium features.

WHY?

Our passion for cryptocurrencies and DeFi pushes us to always be improving to be the perfect trading app. Making trading easier and safer for all crypto enthusiasts and gem hunters.

Check Our Plans!

Unleash all the power and features of DEXTools.

OUR PARTNERS

DEXT TOKEN

DEXT is the DEXTools utility token, with which you can access all the features of the app and participate in our Ecosystem. It's deflationary and available at the following exchanges:

BUY AT UNISWAP
BUY AT PANCAKESWAP BUY AT COINBASE
TOKEN NAME DEXT
CONTRACT ERC20 0xfb7b4564...2777c75a
CONTRACT BEP20 0xe91a8d2...53c29896
TOTAL SUPPLY 140,551,255 DEXT
CIRCULATING SUPPLY 85,544,654 DEXT

PRESS

ROADMAP

2023 Q1-Q2

  • Embed Chart Widget added
  • DEXTools AMA on Binance Live
  • FLOKI partnership
  • DEXTools at Mobile World Congress with BitBase
  • GoPlus Security audits added
  • 3M DEXT token burned!. Burn Dashboard added
  • New Holders Tab in Pair Explorer
  • New website
  • New exclusive Telegram group for 1K $DEXT holders

2023 Q3-Q4

  • Trading simulator & DEXTChallenge
  • New DEXTools Academy website
  • New Chains
  • Improvements based on community feedback
  • New User Area
  • 5 Million DEXT Tokens burned
  • DEXT FORCE Festival
  • 2nd Trading Challenge with over 3,000 participants

2024 Q1-Q2

  • BananaGun Bot & DEXTools partnership
  • DEXTools & Vottun Hackathon Event
  • New Telegram BuyBot
  • New Telegram Bot for Solana pairs
  • DEXTswap on Solana in partnership with Jupiter
  • AlphaGuilty & DEXTools partnership
  • Honeypot.is as the new audit service provider
  • Pool Info previews integrated into links
  • OKX and DEXTools partnership
  • More surprises to come...

2024 Q3-Q4

  • DEXT FORCE Festival 2024 Edition
  • New features and chains
  • New partnerships
  • Backend improvements
  • Enhancements based on user feedback
  • More surprises to come...

Whether a newbie or seasoned DeFi trader, DEXTools Academy is your one-stop shop. Check our latest articles and our Glossary to learn everything about crypto markets.
